how  many types of diabetes are there in the world?

There are several types of diabetes, which can be broadly classified into two main categories: Type 1 and Type 2. Additionally, there are other forms of diabetes, including:

- Gestational diabetes: a type of diabetes that develops during pregnancy
- LADA (Latent Autoimmune Diabetes in Adults): a form of Type 1 diabetes that develops later in life
- MODY (Maturity-Onset Diabetes of the Young): a rare form of diabetes caused by genetic mutations
- Secondary diabetes: a type of diabetes caused by another medical condition or treatment
- Pancreatic diabetes: a rare form of diabetes caused by damage to the pancreas
